script: This is Foley's Cutroom, where auto-generated product walkthrough videos land for review. Every connected repo gets its own folder, showing step counts, takes, and who last touched it. Opening the Foley project reveals the full walkthrough Foley built automatically from pull request activity. Each step is a short clip with narration Foley generated to match the code change in that PR. Once you approve a take, Foley stitches the clips into a finished video and keeps it current with every new PR.
